---
title: "Interactive Demos"
toc: false
format:
  html
resources:
  - "scrennshot/*.png"
listing:
  contents:
    - scripts-gallery.yml
  type: grid
  sort: false
  id: demos
---

### Why this?

This page contains a collection of the interactive demonstrations written as playable [Marimo notebooks](https://docs.marimo.io),  which we’ve been using in our lecture notes.  This page serves as a compilation of all the interactive examples.

These examples complement analytical derivations in mass transfer by transforming mathematical models into interactive components. Click a tile below to interact with them! 


:::{#demos}
:::
